queries.question: Show all of the construction worker salaries, also show the electrician salaries for those working for any of Derek Brown's companies.
queries.sql:
SELECT Trade_Jobs.salary 
FROM Trade_Jobs
WHERE Trade_Jobs.trade_job = "Construction Worker" OR Trade_Jobs.trade_job = "Electrician" AND Trade_Jobs.company_owner = "Derek Brown"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?salary WHERE {
  ?trade_jobs a :Trade_Jobs .
  ?trade_jobs p:salary ?salary .
  ?trade_jobs p:trade_job ?trade_job_w .
  ?trade_jobs p:trade_job ?trade_job_w2 .
  ?trade_jobs p:company_owner ?company_owner_w .
  FILTER((STR(?trade_job_w) = "Construction Worker" || (STR(?trade_job_w2) = "Electrician" && STR(?company_owner_w) = "Derek Brown")))
}

queries.question: List all construction worker salaries and electrician salaries for employees who work for any of Derek Brown's companies.
queries.sql:
SELECT Trade_Jobs.salary 
FROM Trade_Jobs
WHERE (Trade_Jobs.trade_job = "Construction Worker" OR Trade_Jobs.trade_job = "Electrician") AND Trade_Jobs.company_owner = "Derek Brown"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?salary WHERE {
  ?trade_jobs a :Trade_Jobs .
  ?trade_jobs p:salary ?salary .
  ?trade_jobs p:trade_job ?trade_job_w .
  ?trade_jobs p:trade_job ?trade_job_w2 .
  ?trade_jobs p:company_owner ?company_owner_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?trade_job_w) = "Construction Worker" || STR(?trade_job_w2) = "Electrician")) && STR(?company_owner_w) = "Derek Brown"))
}
